title: Migrate CacheConfig to JacksonJsonRedisSerializer
description: Migrate Jackson2JsonRedisSerializer to JacksonJsonRedisSerializer in CacheConfig and CacheSerializationTest as per plan/21-cacheconfig-jackson2json-migration.md

title: Implement CQRS for Attachment
description: Add CQRS implementation for the Attachment domain. Create AttachmentCommandService and AttachmentQueryService following existing patterns, add JPA repository for writes and JOOQ repository for reads, update controllers to use query service, ensure tests are updated.

title: Fix Redis cache key conversion for publication queries
description: Spring cacheable publication query currently uses PublicationParams as the Redis key, which fails because RedisCacheConfiguration expects a String-convertible key. Make the cache key deterministic and string-based, and add coverage for the key generation path.

value: Cache Redis pada CacheConfig pakai GenericJacksonJsonRedisSerializer.builder().build() tanpa default typing. Akibatnya nilai dideserialisasi sebagai LinkedHashMap dan gagal di-cast ke DTO (mis. PublicationResponse, Page<PublicationResponse>) saat cache hit. Solusi: aktifkan default typing dengan allow-list base package id.perumdamts.mail; jangan cache Page<T> langsung — bungkus ke PagedResult<T>. Plan: plan/10-publication-cache-cast-fix.md.
